name: provenance-tracking-com
description: Geospatial Data Lineage & Provenance Tracking — static site built with Eleventy.

scripts.deploy: npm run clean && npm run build && wrangler pages deploy _site --project-name=provenance-tracking-com --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run clean && npm run build && wrangler pages deploy _site --project-name=provenance-tracking-com --branch=preview --commit-dirty=true
